title: sida alii var. alii
intro: Sida alii var. alii, also known as Sida alii, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sida alii var. alii include treating fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and skin irritations. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in capsule or tincture form to utilize its herbal benefits.
